columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Represents the unique identifier for each specific game within the NFL.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Indicates the NFL season number, providing context for the year in which the games are played.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Denotes the week of the NFL season during which the game occurs, helping to organize the schedule.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Specifies the type of game, such as regular season, playoff, or exhibition, which is crucial for categorization.

columns.name: gameday
columns.comment: Represents the date of the game, allowing for quick reference to when the event takes place.

columns.name: home_team
columns.comment: Identifies the team that is playing at their home stadium, which can affect game dynamics.

columns.name: away_team
columns.comment: Identifies the team that is visiting the home team, providing context for rivalry and competition.

columns.name: gap_reason
columns.comment: Explains the reason for any discrepancies or gaps in the data related to the game, which is important for data integrity.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Records the timestamp when the data was ingested, useful for tracking data updates and managing data freshness.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Names the source file from which the data was obtained, facilitating data origin tracking.
